app.name: Kelva
app.audience_constraint: Global. App shipped in 5 languages (DE / EN / ES / FR / IT). §437 / §438 BGB warranty auto-calculation is a DE-law bonus where it applies; the core product (mail-inbox parsing, warranty / receipt / subscription overview, household sharing) works in every market.
app.live_status: App Store live since May 2026 (Apple-approved), all 5 languages shipped

brief.headline: Kelva
brief.tagline: Mail-inbox-connected receipt, warranty and subscription manager. Shipped in 5 languages.
brief.what_it_is: Kelva is an iOS + Android app that digitally manages receipts, warranties and subscriptions. The user connects multiple mail addresses (read-only), incoming mail lands directly in Kelva, gets parsed by AI or a quick manual scan, the user classifies it (invoice, warranty, subscription, contract) and sets reminders. The overview holds all receipts, warranties and subs in one place, plus an optional vault for important documents. With household sharing, a family opens a shared inbox — everyone sees what is going on, priorities split, nothing falls through the cracks. Shipped in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
brief.who_for: Adults 25-55 worldwide who manage device inventory, warranties and recurring subscriptions for themselves or their household. Audience skews consumer-conscious, mildly DIY, family- or partner-led households. Creators who sit well: savings-tip and personal-finance creators, family-organisation IGers, lifehack TikTokers, small tech reviewers, consumer-law explainers (DE: lawyer TikTokers around §437 / §438 BGB; EN / ES / FR / IT: general consumer-protection angle).
features: Mail-inbox parsing: connect multiple mail addresses read-only, AI auto-classifies invoices, warranties, subscriptions, contracts; or quick manual scan.
Receipt + warranty + subscription overview: one dashboard for everything paper-y, filterable by category, device or vendor.
Push reminders: 30 / 7 / 1 day before warranty expires or subscription auto-renews.
§437 / §438 BGB warranty auto-calculation (DE-law bonus): app computes the consumer-warranty deadline per device for German purchases; users outside DE see standard manufacturer-warranty lookup.
Household sharing: shared family inbox, everyone sees the same overview, priorities split per member.
Document vault + Snap-to-Done: store warranty PDFs / manuals / contracts; tap once to mark a receipt as handled.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: annual Premium subscription.
Pricing: 29.99 USD / year (no monthly plan currently).
Free tier is generous: manual receipt entry + photo scan, push reminders 30 / 7 / 1 day before expiry, Snap-to-Done, §438 auto-calculation (DE), manufacturer warranty lookup, household sharing.
Premium unlocks: AI-based email-inbound classification (email scan mode off / warranty-only / all), advanced family features.
Languages live: DE / EN / ES / FR / IT — global audience addressable.
brief.why_this_works: People lose money to expired warranties and forgotten subscriptions across every market — it's not a DACH problem. The mail-inbox parsing demo is visually strong in any language, and household sharing gives family-content creators a unique angle. The §437 / §438 BGB auto-calculation is a real DE-specific bonus that lawyer-TikToker types can demo concretely, but the core product (single place for everything paper-y) sells in EN / ES / FR / IT too. 29.99 USD annual converts at above-average rates because the alternative (one missed warranty claim = 200-500 EUR lost) is concrete.

en.subtitle: for consumer / savings / lifehack creators (global, all 5 app languages)
en.hero_quote: Connect mail inbox, app parses receipts automatically. Earn from content your audience already needs.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: Kelva is an iOS + Android app that digitally manages receipts, warranties and subscriptions. You connect multiple mail addresses (read-only), incoming mail lands directly in Kelva, gets parsed by AI or a quick manual scan, you classify it (invoice, warranty, sub, contract) and set reminders. The overview holds all receipts, warranties and subs in one place, plus an optional vault for important documents. With household sharing you open a shared family inbox — everyone sees what is going on, priorities are split, nothing falls through the cracks. App shipped in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT.
en.why_this_works: Overflowing inboxes, subs you only notice when they debit, warranty receipts in a shoebox. Three inboxes, no overview — in any country. Kelva is the single place that does all three.
free_vs_premium: Free: manual receipt entry + photo scan, push reminder 30 / 7 / 1 day before expiry, Snap-to-Done, §438 auto-calculation (DE consumers), manufacturer warranty lookup, household sharing.
Premium (29.99 USD/year): AI-based email-inbound classification (email scan mode off / warranty-only / all) + advanced family features.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates (no posting obligation).
audience_fit_good: Family-organisation IGers (5k-100k, very high — loyal, engaged).
Lifehack creators in any of the 5 languages (DE / EN / ES / FR / IT, 30k-500k).
Consumer-law explainers: lawyer TikTokers (DE: §437 / §438 angle; EN / ES / FR / IT: general consumer-protection angle).
Family-mom + parent influencers (10k-200k, inventory pain is real).
audience_fit_poor: Pure aesthetic accounts without a practical-life angle.

reel_hooks.label: Faceless content (lifehack demos)
items: Screen recording "mail in, app parses everything" — 30s app screen only, email inbound pops up, AI classifies, you assign, reminder set.
B-roll family inbox + voiceover — 45s, B-roll of overflowing mail + receipt shoebox, voice: "order confirmations, warranty mails, subs you forgot, no overview", cut to Kelva dashboard.
Warranty-deadline explainer (DE-localised: §437 BGB; other markets: "the warranty clock most people miss") — 60s static slide + voiceover, cut to Kelva with auto-calculated deadline.
Comparison "Excel vs Kelva" — 30s split-screen, left: 47-device Excel nobody maintains, right: Kelva with family inbox + push reminder.
Claim-letter reveal (DE roadmap feature, tease only) — 20s, "dryer broken — 1 tap → legally sound §437 letter ready to send" (note: don't promise as immediately available, tease as upcoming).

reel_hooks.label: UGC / your voice (consumer-life authority)
items: Lawyer explainer clip — 60s, you in lawyer setting, locale-specific angle (DE: "§437 BGB — three sentences most people don't know"; EN: "the 1-year warranty clock you keep forgetting"). (Lawyers: respect local BORA-equivalent rules, no concrete legal advice in the Kelva context.)
Family vlog "How I manage our receipts" — 90s, your normal family vlog format, Kelva as 10-second beat, demo household sharing.
"What happens when your dryer breaks after 18 months" — 75s scenario, without Kelva = receipt search for hours, with Kelva = 3 taps with date + warranty status + next steps.
Savings-coach persona "How I don't lose 200 EUR / USD / GBP a year" — 60s, "last month I missed an expired warranty — 280 EUR gone, here's the app that would have caught it".
Household-sharing demo with real family — 90s, you + partner / kids at the table.

story_ideas: Education story: warranty-deadline explainer slide (locale-adapted) + sticker "the clock most people miss" + link sticker.
Social proof: Kelva dashboard screenshot, caption "this is now our family inbox for everything paper-y".
Direct ask: selfie story, "1 year Premium with my link" + link sticker.
carousel_ideas: "5 apps every household needs" (Kelva on slide 1, no hard sell).
"How I claimed back a 320 EUR / USD warranty" (case-study carousel, slide 6 = affiliate link).
"Subscription cleanup: 47 to 12 in one weekend" (process carousel).
en.posting_cadence: Consumer-lifehack audience: highest engagement Sun evening ("plan-the-week") and Wed evening ("midweek-organise"). Lawyer TikTokers: any day, edutainment performs best 7-10pm local time. 1 reel per week is plenty. Stories with link sticker on weekends bring the bulk of conversions.
en.conversion_math: Micro lawyer / consumer-law TikToker (50k followers, 1 reel): 25,000 views x 2% CTR = 500 clicks, 30% install = 150 installs, 8% Premium = 12 subs, 12 months attribution x 29.99 USD x 50% = ~180 USD per reel. Mid-tier savings-tip (80k IG, 1 reel): 40,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 600 clicks, 30% install = 180 installs, 7% Premium = 13 subs, ~195 USD per reel. Macro family-mom (300k IG, 1 carousel): reach 120,000 x 1.2% CTR = 1,440 clicks, 25% install = 360 installs, 6% Premium = 22 subs, ~330 USD per post. Annual pricing means lower per-month math but higher LTV up-front. Consumer-law content has above-average save / share rate which compounds.
tracking_model_lines: Your link kelva.space/i/[yourhandle] works on any platform.
Android: Google Play install referrer passes handle natively, deterministic.
iOS warm: Universal Link with handle.
iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic): signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink, live-verified via Wavelength.
On first app open: optional "Invited by @[handle]? Yes / No" confirmer for clean attribution.
RevenueCat webhook fires on annual Premium purchase, 50% credited (24-month window for renewals).
onboarding_steps: Click the personal link from Mail 2 (valid 7 days).
Fill in: handle, Wise payout details, country (tax docs), billing address.
Free Lifetime Premium activated on your Kelva account.
Dashboard at getklar.org/dashboard via magic link.
dashboard_lines: Active Premium subs in your bucket.
Claimable + paid + carry-over + next payout date + refund holdback pipeline.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, warranty-deadline explainer slides (locale-adapted), mail-inbox demo footage and ready-made captions: getklar.org/i/kelva/brand-assets (link goes live with your onboarding mail).
faq: Which languages and markets does Kelva work in?

App is shipped in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT. The §437 / §438 BGB warranty auto-calculation is a DE-law feature where it applies; the core product (mail-inbox parsing, warranty / receipt / subscription overview, household sharing) works in every market. Affiliates from any country are welcome.
Can I post in English (or ES / FR / IT)?

Yes. Pitch the core product (single place for receipts + warranties + subscriptions, household sharing, mail-inbox parsing). For DE audiences additionally lean on §437 / §438 BGB. For non-DE audiences lean on generic consumer-protection / household-inventory angle.
Lawyer compliance — what can I say?

Educate about consumer-warranty law in general terms (locale-appropriate). Do NOT give specific legal advice through the Kelva context (BORA risk in DE, similar bar-association rules elsewhere). "App calculates the deadline" is fine. "App writes your claim letter" is roadmap, don't promise as live.
Disclosure duty?
Yes. Rev-share = paid recommendation. #ad / #sponsored / IG "Paid Partnership". Local disclosure law applies (FTC in US, UWG §5a in DE / AT, EU AVMSD-derived rules elsewhere).
Flat fee on top?
Mid+ yes, 150-500 USD / EUR per reel. Macro depends on audience-fit, 500-2,000 USD negotiable for clear lifehack / savings-tip / consumer-law creators.
What if Premium pricing changes?
You continue to earn 50% on the then-current price.

de.subtitle: für Consumer- / Spar- / Lifehack-Creator (global, alle 5 App-Sprachen)
de.hero_quote: Mail-Postfach verbinden, App parst Belege automatisch. Verdien an Content den deine Audience eh braucht.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: Kelva ist eine iOS + Android-App, die Belege, Garantien und Abos digital managed. Du verbindest mehrere Mail-Adressen mit der App (read-only), eingehende Mails landen direkt in Kelva, werden per KI oder schnellem manuellen Scan ausgelesen, du ordnest sie zu (Rechnung, Garantie, Abo, Vertrag) und setzt Reminder. In der Übersicht hast du alle Belege, Garantien und Abos an einem Ort, plus einen optionalen Tresor für wichtige Dokumente. Mit Haushalts-Sharing kannst du einen gemeinsamen Familien-Inbox eröffnen — jeder sieht was läuft, ihr teilt Prioritäten auf, nichts geht mehr durch die Lappen. App in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT live.
de.why_this_works: Überquellende Postfächer, Abos die du nur durch die Buchung merkst, Garantie-Belege im Schuhkarton. Drei Postfächer, keine Übersicht — in jedem Land. Kelva ist der eine Ort der das alles macht.
free_vs_premium: Free: manuelle Beleg-Eingabe + Foto-Scan, Push-Reminder 30 / 7 / 1 Tag vor Ablauf, Snap-to-Done, §438-Auto-Kalkulation (für deutsche Käufe), Hersteller-Garantie-Lookup, Haushalts-Sharing.
Premium (29,99 USD/Jahr): KI-basierte Email-Inbound-Klassifikation (Email-Scan-Mode off / warranty-only / all) + erweiterte Familien-Features.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates (kein Posting-Zwang).
audience_fit_good: Lifehack-Creator in jeder der 5 Sprachen (DE / EN / ES / FR / IT, 30k-500k).
Verbraucherrecht-Erklärer: Anwalt-TikToker (DE: §437 / §438 Angle; EN / ES / FR / IT: allgemeiner Verbraucherschutz-Angle).

reel_hooks.label: Faceless Content (Lifehack-Demos)
items: Screen-Recording "Mail rein, App parst alles" — 30s nur App-Screen, Email-Inbound-View popped up, KI klassifiziert, du ordnest zu, Reminder gesetzt.

B-Roll Familien-Postfach + Voiceover — 45s, B-Roll von überquellenden Mail-Postfächern + Beleg-Schuhkarton, Voice: "Bestellbestätigungen, Garantie-Mails, vergessene Abos, keine Übersicht", Cut auf Kelva-Dashboard.
Garantie-Frist-Erklärung (DE-lokalisiert: §437 BGB; andere Märkte: "die Garantie-Uhr die die meisten verpassen") — 60s statisches Slide + Voiceover, Cut auf Kelva mit Auto-Deadline.
Comparison "Excel vs Kelva" — 30s Split-Screen, links: 47-Geräte-Excel den keiner pflegt, rechts: Kelva mit Family-Inbox + Push-Reminder.

Claim-Letter-Reveal (DE-Roadmap-Feature, nur teasen) — 20s, "Trockner kaputt — 1 Tap → legal-sicheres §437-Schreiben ready zum Senden" (Hinweis: nicht als sofort verfügbar versprechen, als upcoming teasen).

reel_hooks.label: UGC / Deine Stimme (Consumer-Life-Authority)
items: Anwalt-Explainer-Clip — 60s, du im Anwalts-Setting, locale-spezifischer Angle (DE: "§437 BGB — drei Sätze die die meisten nicht kennen"; EN: "the 1-year warranty clock you keep forgetting"). (Anwälte: lokale BORA-äquivalente Regeln respektieren, keine konkrete Rechtsberatung im Kelva-Kontext.)
Family-Vlog "Wie ich unsere Belege manage" — 90s, dein normales Familien-Vlog-Format, Kelva als 10-Sekunden-Beat, Haushalts-Sharing demonstrieren.
"Was passiert wenn dein Trockner nach 18 Monaten kaputt geht" — 75s Szenario, ohne Kelva = stundenlange Beleg-Suche, mit Kelva = 3 Taps mit Datum + Garantie-Status + nächste Schritte.
Sparcoach-Persona "So verliere ich nicht 200 EUR / USD / GBP pro Jahr" — 60s, "letzten Monat eine abgelaufene Garantie verpasst — 280 EUR weg, hier ist die App die das gefangen hätte".
Haushalts-Sharing-Demo mit echter Familie — 90s, du + Partner / Kids am Tisch.

story_ideas: Education-Story: Garantie-Frist-Explainer-Slide (locale-adaptiert) + Sticker "die Uhr die die meisten verpassen" + Link-Sticker.
Social-Proof: Kelva-Dashboard-Screenshot, Caption "das ist jetzt unsere Familien-Inbox für alles Papierhafte".
Direct-Ask: Selfie-Story, "1 Jahr Premium mit meinem Link" + Link-Sticker.
carousel_ideas: "5 Apps die jeder Haushalt braucht" (Kelva Slide 1, kein Hard-Sell).
"Wie ich 320 EUR / USD Garantie zurückgeholt habe" (Case-Study-Carousel, Slide 6 = Affiliate-Link).
de.posting_cadence: Consumer-Lifehack-Audience: höchstes Engagement So Abend ("plan-die-Woche") und Mi Abend ("Midweek-Organize"). Anwalt-TikToker: jeden Tag, Edutainment performt am besten 19-22h Lokal-Zeit. 1 Reel pro Woche reicht. Stories mit Link-Sticker am Wochenende bringen das Gros der Conversions.
de.conversion_math: Mikro-Anwalt- / Verbraucherrecht-TikToker (50k Follower, 1 Reel): 25.000 Views x 2% CTR = 500 Klicks, 30% Install = 150 Installs, 8% Premium = 12 Subs, 12 Monate Attribution x 29,99 USD x 50% = ~180 USD pro Reel. Mid-Tier Spartipp (80k IG, 1 Reel): 40.000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 600 Klicks, 30% Install = 180 Installs, 7% Premium = 13 Subs, ~195 USD pro Reel. Macro Family-Mom (300k IG, 1 Carousel): Reach 120.000 x 1,2% CTR = 1.440 Klicks, 25% Install = 360 Installs, 6% Premium = 22 Subs, ~330 USD pro Post. Annual-Pricing bedeutet niedrigere Per-Month-Math aber höherer LTV up-front. Verbraucherrecht-Content hat überdurchschnittliche Save-/Share-Rate die compoundet.
tracking_model_lines: Dein Link kelva.space/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform.
Android: Google Play Install-Referrer gibt Handle nativ weiter, deterministisch.
iOS cold (~99% des Creator-Traffic): signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink, live-verifiziert via Wavelength.
Beim ersten App-Öffnen: optionaler "Invited by @[handle]? Yes / No"-Confirmer für saubere Attribution.
RevenueCat-Webhook feuert beim jährlichen Premium-Kauf, 50% gutgeschrieben (24-Monate-Window für Renewals).
onboarding_steps: Klick den persönlichen Link aus Mail 2 (7 Tage gültig).
Du gibst ein: Handle, Wise-Payout-Details, Land (Steuer-Doku), Rechnungsadresse.
Free Lifetime Premium auf deinem Kelva-Account aktiv.
dashboard_lines: Claimable + Paid + Carry-over + nächster Auszahlungs-Termin + Refund-Holdback-Pipeline.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, Garantie-Frist-Explainer-Slides (locale-adaptiert), Mail-Inbox-Demo-Footage und fertige Captions: getklar.org/i/kelva/brand-assets (Link wird mit deinem Onboarding-Mail aktiv).
faq: Welche Sprachen und Märkte deckt Kelva ab?

App ist in DE / EN / ES / FR / IT shipped. Die §437 / §438 BGB Garantie-Auto-Kalkulation ist ein DE-Recht-Feature wo es greift; das Kern-Produkt (Mail-Inbox-Parsing, Garantie- / Beleg- / Abo-Übersicht, Haushalts-Sharing) funktioniert in jedem Markt. Affiliates aus jedem Land willkommen.
Kann ich auf Englisch (oder ES / FR / IT) posten?

Ja. Pitch das Kern-Produkt (ein Ort für Belege + Garantien + Abos, Haushalts-Sharing, Mail-Inbox-Parsing). Für DE-Audience zusätzlich §437 / §438 BGB hervorheben. Für nicht-DE-Audience generischen Verbraucherschutz- / Haushalts-Inventory-Angle nutzen.
Anwalt-Compliance — was kann ich sagen?

Allgemein über Verbraucher-Garantierecht educaten (locale-passend). Bitte KEINE konkrete Rechtsberatung im Kelva-Kontext (BORA-Risk in DE, ähnliche Bar-Association-Regeln anderswo). "App rechnet die Frist aus" ist OK. "App schreibt dein Reklamations-Schreiben" ist Roadmap, nicht als live versprechen.
Kennzeichnungspflicht?
Ja. Rev-Share = bezahlte Empfehlung. #ad / #Werbung / IG "Paid Partnership". Lokales Disclosure-Recht gilt (FTC in US, UWG §5a in DE / AT, EU-AVMSD-Regeln anderswo).
Flat-Fee on-top?
Mid+ ja, 150-500 USD / EUR pro Reel. Macro je nach Audience-Fit, 500-2.000 USD verhandelbar für klare Lifehack- / Spartipp- / Verbraucherrecht-Creator.
Was wenn Premium-Preis sich ändert?
Du verdienst weiter 50% auf den dann aktuellen Preis.
